info.name: OS2 User Management Service — L1 API Tests

description.content:
Layer 1: API Testing for gw-user-mgmt-svc

Comprehensive endpoint validation:
- Happy path (14 endpoints)
- Error boundary tests (400, 401, 403, 404, 422)
- Idempotency validation
- Schema assertions

Execution: newman run OS2-User-Mgmt-L1-API-Tests.postman_collection.json --environment env.dev.json
